articles.title: US cybersecurity agency CISA had to build its incident playbook during the incident, agency reveals
articles.summary: Independent cybersecurity journalist Brian Krebs reported in May that a security researcher with cyber firm GitGuardian alerted him to reams of exposed passwords stored in a publicly accessible GitHub repository, which an employee of a CISA contractor had uploaded.

articles.title: Phia accused of ‘cookie stuffing,’ taking affiliate credit on purchases it didn’t earn
articles.summary: Phia, the shopping startup founded by Bill Gates’ daughter, Phoebe, and her friend Sophia Kianni is under fire for a practice known as “cookie stuffing,” which helped the product receive commissions and credit for sales it did not actually generate, per a Bloomberg investigation.

articles.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
articles.summary: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."

articles.title: Bluesky’s interim CEO, Toni Schneider, drops the ‘interim’
articles.summary: Schneider, who formerly served as the CEO of Automattic and is a partner at True Ventures, says he is "all in" on the unconventional social media platform.

articles.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
articles.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

articles.title: Filing: College app Fizz accuses VC of sharing confidential startup information with rival Sidechat
articles.summary: Fizz has expanded its lawsuit against rival Sidechat, alleging that a Maveron VC shared its confidential information obtained during a fundraising meeting with the competing startup.

articles.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
articles.summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

articles.title: A new app, HyperTexting, turns the open web into a scrollable social media-like feed
articles.summary: HyperTexting's new app aims to make the open web feel more like social media by turning websites, blogs, newsletters, and podcasts into a scrollable feed, while also making it easier to post to your own website.

articles.title: The Week’s 10 Biggest Funding Rounds: A Pair Of Billion-Dollar Deals For Cyber And AI Infrastructure Lead
articles.summary: AI once again dominated venture funding this week, claiming five of the 10 largest announced rounds, including a pair of billion-dollar financings for AI infrastructure and cybersecurity that led the pack.

articles.title: 5 Interesting Startup Deals You May Have Missed: AI That Dispatches The Plumber, Underground Warfare And Cutting Down Private-Market Paperwork

articles.title: Apple accuses OpenAI, and former design star Jony Ive’s io Products firm, of stealing hardware trade secrets in blockbuster lawsuit
articles.summary: The lawsuit alleges that two former Apple employees now working at OpenAI stole confidential data including information about unreleased hardware products and technical specifications.

articles.title: OpenAI’s latest AI model likely has similar cyber vulnerabilities to one that led to U.S. export controls on Anthropic’s Fable, British agency says

articles.title: Memory chip giant SK Hynix jumps nearly 13% in Wall Street debut as AI frenzy powers biggest initial share sale in the U.S. by a foreign company
articles.summary: SK Hynix priced its American depositary receipts, or ADRs, at $149 each Thursday. They opened Friday at $170 and closed at $168.01.

articles.title: Billionaires warned New York would scare off business. Anthropic and Airbnb just made their biggest bets on the city yet
articles.summary: Not only are they expanding their footprint, they’re also doubling headcount. Anthropic said it plans to have more than 1,000 employees by end of year.

articles.title: Meet ‘Freedom Fuel Network’ stations, a new chain with cheaper gas and mysterious origins
articles.summary: Freedom Fuel Network sells gasoline at prices well below the average, but the chain has revealed little about itself.

articles.title: When Erling Haaland isn’t playing for Norway in the World Cup, he’s investing in a chess championship and playing an animated Viking
articles.summary: Soccer star Erling Haaland has led Norway to the World Cup quarterfinals—but off the pitch, he’s investing in chess and starring in a Viking movie.

articles.title: This summer’s hottest IPOs are minting a new class of ultra-high-net-worth ‘IPO Bros’—and family offices are changing how they approach them
articles.summary: A hot IPO summer means family offices are learning how to navigate newly minuted UHNW "IPO Bros" who have that entrepreneurial spirit.

articles.title: Taylor Swift paid New York City more than $160,000 to cover the costs tied to her wedding, Mayor Zohran Mamdani confirmed
articles.summary: As they tied the knot, they also tied the city in gridlock as police barricaded streets around MSG and permits were filed to keep traffic flowing.

articles.title: Wall Street is debating the AI buildout. Enterprises just answered: 86% say their GPUs run at half capacity or less
articles.summary: Enterprise companies are running AI agents ahead of the controls needed to manage them — and they deployed that way knowingly. articles.title: Enterprise AI is entering an evaluation gap: Agents are gaining autonomy faster than companies can verify them

Enterprise AI teams are giving agents more freedom at the same moment their confidence in automated testing is collapsing.

articles.title: Google's TabFM skips per-dataset training and still predicts on tables it's never seen

articles.title: 赢官司、融新钱，他想把百万「抗癌针」变平价
articles.summary:
文 | 胡香赟

编辑 | 海若镜

36氪获悉，前传奇生物创始人/首席科学家范晓虎创办的生物科技公司深圳湾岛细胞，近日完成1.4亿人民币A轮融资，本轮融资由松禾资本领投、东方富海跟投。

过去一年，AI像一束强光照亮着资本市场。光芒之外，很多赛道在阴影中被重新定价，创新药板块正是其中之一。潮水褪去，人群对新药好药的需求仍在，创业者们也正在更严苛的估值坐标系里，渡过科学、临床和商业化的一关又一关。

在中国细胞与基因治疗（CGT）领域，“范晓虎”这个名字很难被绕开。2022年3月，他主导的传奇生物细胞药物西达基奥仑赛在欧美上

articles.title: 36 氪 AI 测评小程序上新！看真实体验与深度测评，多个新功能等你来玩~
articles.summary:
先问一个扎心的问题：过去半年，你陆陆续续体验过多少个AI产品，又有多少个真正地被留下来？

一个新AI产品刷屏，你火速打开官网、注册、验证码、绑定手机，结果试了五分钟——要么排队排到天荒地老，要么生成的东西一言难尽，要么免费额度3秒用完开始催你充值。热闹是它们的，浪费的时间和手机号是你的。

更麻烦的是，你想提前打听打听哪个好用，网上一搜要么全是水评，看不出到底哪好；要么明里暗里恰饭，让人分不清是真心还是广告。

这也是我们做 36 氪 AI 测评的初衷：我们希望搭建一套标准化、客观公正的评测平台，不仅是AI行业的大众点评，
